reforms.description: A significant reform of the state pension system replaced the previous compulsory Pay-As-You-Go system with a three-tier mechanism, which includes two fully-funded private tiers. This reform aims to create a pool of domestic capital to finance the expansion of dynamic firms and includes the Act on Mortgage Banks and Mortgage Bonds, which was passed to improve facilities for the extension of long-term loans required for economic growth.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The reform is expected to enhance capital availability for dynamic firms, thereby supporting economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been enacted and is currently in force.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a structural change in the pension system and financial mechanisms for firms.
reforms.source_quote: A recent reform of the state pension system should help to create a pool of domestic capital that may serve to finance further expansion of dynamic firms.

reforms.description: The government passed an act permitting the creation of Mortgage Banks that sell mortgage-backed bonds to expand the stock of credits available to small enterprises, aiming to improve access to financing for smaller firms.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: This initiative is designed to enhance financing options for small enterprises, which can stimulate innovation and growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The act has been passed and is currently operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: While significant, this reform is narrower in scope compared to the overall pension reform.
reforms.source_quote: The government recently passed an act permitting the creation of Mortgage Banks that sell mortgage-backed bonds with an eye to expanding the stock of credits available to such firms.

reforms.description: Hungary is restructuring its science system to enhance cross-disciplinary research and improve linkages with industry, aiming to foster innovation and technical know-how.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving linkages between research and industry is expected to enhance innovation capacity and economic performance.
reforms.status_evidence: The restructuring has been announced but not yet fully implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is significant in its aim to improve the science system but does not represent a complete overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: Efforts should continue to restructure the science system with a focus on cross-disciplinary research and improving linkages with industry.
